entries.title: Edit thumbnails directly
entries.description: Select a customer or supplier thumbnail to replace it, with clearer controls for removing images.

entries.title: Set product display order
entries.description: Choose the order in which products appear in product lists and the public catalog.

entries.title: Preview brochure banners accurately
entries.description: Brochure banner previews now match the wide shape used in the finished brochure.

entries.title: Scan forms more easily
entries.description: Customer and supplier details are now grouped into clearer cards.

entries.title: Use tidier filter controls
entries.description: The reset filters button now takes up less space.

entries.title: Browse products in a curated order
entries.description: Products now appear in their intended display order throughout the catalog and related-product suggestions.

entries.title: Navigate catalog filters smoothly
entries.description: Product filters now stay visible, scroll results into the right position, preserve your place when returning, and avoid showing redundant options.

entries.title: See more consistent page headers
entries.description: Public page headers now use a more compact, aligned layout across screen sizes.

entries.title: Follow old website links safely
entries.description: Legacy website links now redirect visitors to the matching current pages.

entries.title: Pull down to refresh
entries.description: Refresh the latest bay and job information from the main board, bay queues, and job details.
